items.title: VI Live: Real Madrid leeft toe naar aftrap, Faber gooit het om bij Heracles
items.summary: Welkom in de VI Live van zondag 1 februari. Hier nemen we je mee in drie Eredivisie-duels, een topper in Engeland en alle andere hoogtepunten op de (inter)nationale velden.

items.title: Szoboszlai: Liverpool future 'not in my hands'
items.summary: Liverpool midfielder Dominik Szoboszlai has admitted he would love to extend his stay at the club but said the decision is "not in [his] hands".

items.title: 0-2 at HT, 3-2 at FT! Chelsea in epic comeback win...
items.summary: Chelsea came from two goals down to seal a remarkable 3-2 victory over relegation-threatened West Ham United on Saturday.

items.title: Sources: Liverpool go for Sunderland's Geertruida
items.summary: Liverpool are interested in signing Netherlands international Lutsharel Geertruida on loan from RB Leipzig, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: VI Live: Ajax geeft het wéér weg, Excelsior komt terug tot 2-2
items.summary: Ajax gaat zondagmiddag om 12.15 uur op bezoek bij Excelsior. De Amsterdammers hopen te profiteren van het feit dat PSV en Feyenoord later op de dag tegenover elkaar staan. Of dat lukt, volg je in deze VI Live.

items.title: Team England hold off Team World to win Reignwood Icons of Football
items.summary: Team England held off Team World to defend their Reignwood Icons of Football title with a 20-19 victory.

items.title: Ajax meldt zich bij NEC voor Sano
items.summary: Kort voor het sluiten van de transferperiode heeft Ajax zich gemeld voor Kodai Sano. NEC wil de Japanner niet laten vertrekken, dus het zal voor Ajax lastig genoeg worden om hem naar Amsterdam te halen.

items.title: Sarr leads the line for Palace at Forest LIVE! & highlights
Opstelling Feyenoord: St. Juste direct in de basis tegen PSV
items.summary: Robin van Persie gooit Jerry St. Juste zondag meteen voor de leeuwen tegen PSV. De kersverse aanwinst van Feyenoord maakt zo zijn rentree voor de Rotterdammers. Naast hem keert Anel Ahmedhodzic terug in de basis, terwijl Ayase Ueda als spits aan de aftrap verschijnt.

items.title: Bosz kiest voor twee verrassende namen bij PSV tegen Feyenoord
items.summary: Peter Bosz heeft twee verrassingen in petto in zijn basisopstelling van PSV tegen Feyenoord. Esmir Bajraktarević neemt de plaats over van de afwezige Dennis Man, terwijl ook Armando Obispo mag blijven staan. De international van Curaçao krijgt de voorkeur boven Yarek Gasiorowski.

items.title: Alcaraz makes history with victory over Djokovic in Australian Open final
items.summary: World No 1 Carlos Alcaraz completed a career Grand Slam - winning all four major singles title - at the age of 22 with a four-set victory over Novak Djokovic in the Australian Open final.

items.title: The Basque derby - the friendliest rivalry in world football?
items.summary: With a sense of shared identity and fans mixing in the stands, is the Basque derby between Athletic Club and Real Sociedad the friendliest in the world?

items.title: Hull and high water: Blackburn left fighting the drop in chaotic campaign
items.summary: Saturday’s home defeat leaves Rovers in relegation trouble amid pitch problems and fan anger with Venky’s For Blackburn managers of the recent past, this has been the cruellest month. Jon Dahl Tomasson and John Eustace left the club in February 2024 and 2025 respectively when they became disconnected from the club’s unpopular owners, Venky’s. The problem for the current manager, Valérien Ismaël, is that fans are growing increasingly anxious for another change in the dugout as the cycle repeats itself. It has been another winter of discontent at Ewood Park. After finishing seventh last season thanks to a late season surge under Ismaël, there will be no push for the top six this time. A scrappy defeat by Hull via Lewis Koumas’s 81st-minute winner made it one win in 15 games in all competitions, Rovers now mired in the relegation zone and the prospect of dropping to League One is alarmingly real with a three-point gap to West Brom in the last safe position. Continue reading...

items.title: The most powerful woman in football - meet game's first female super agent
items.summary: Super agent Rafaela Pimenta looks after some of the biggest names in the game. She has been speaking exclusively to the BBC

items.title: 'Torres-like' Ekitike haunts long-term admirers Newcastle
items.summary: Newcastle United needed no reminding of Hugo Ekitike's quality after trying to sign him last summer - and the Liverpool striker haunted his former suitors at Anfield on Saturday.

items.title: Konaté offered to make early Liverpool return after father’s death, Slot reveals
items.summary: Centre-back scores emotional goal against Newcastle Slot: ‘Everyone was cheering for Ibou in dressing room’ Arne Slot revealed Ibrahima Konaté was not due to face Newcastle after the recent death of his father. The centre-back was rewarded for responding to Liverpool’s defensive crisis with his first Premier League goal at Anfield. Konaté returned from compassionate leave after three matches out to cap Liverpool’s convincing 4-1 comeback win against Eddie Howe’s team. The France international was in tears after scoring in front of the Kop and admitted he did not “have words to describe what I feel right now” after the poignant goal. Continue reading...
